name: Lemon Angel Roll
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 350°F.
2. Line a jelly roll pan with aluminum foil, extending the foil 1 inch over the ends of the pan.
3. Prepare the cake mix according to package directions.
4. Spread batter evenly into the prepared pan and bake for 30 minutes.
5. Immediately turn out the cake onto a plate sprinkled with powdered sugar.
6. Peel off the foil and roll the cake tightly from the narrow end, using the towel jelly-roll fashion.
7. Cool thoroughly.
8. Meanwhile, in a mixing bowl, combine the sweetened condensed milk, lemon juice, lemon peel, and food coloring. Mix well.
9. Fold in the whipped topping.
10. Unroll the cake; trim any excess edges.
11. Spread half of the lemon mixture over one side of the roll.
12. Reroll the cake without the towel, seam side down.
13. Place on a serving platter, with the seam side down.
14. Spread the remaining lemon mixture over the top of the roll.
